## Results

<!-- Nature Letter: Results and Discussion are often merged under a
     single "Results" heading or split into short sub-sections.
     For Frontiers in Biogeography keep Results and Discussion separate.

     Suggested sub-sections (adjust to actual findings):
     - Data overview (sites, taxa, time windows)
     - Model fit and performance
     - Co-occurrence patterns across space
     - Temporal dynamics of co-occurrence
     - Drivers of co-occurrence change
-->

```{r}
#| label: fig-cooccurrence-overview
#| echo: false
#| output: false
# Example: read and plot co-occurrence summary target
# res_associations <- targets::tar_read(
#   name = "res_associations",
#   store = set_store
# )
```

### Data overview

TODO: Report number of sites, taxa, time windows, and samples retained
after filtering (use inline `r` expressions — no hardcoded numbers).

### Model performance

TODO: Report predictive performance metrics (AUC, RMSE, etc.).

### Co-occurrence patterns

TODO: Describe spatial and temporal patterns in species associations.

### Environmental drivers

TODO: Describe ANOVA variance partitioning results.
